Industry Panel: Landing a Tech Internship

Hear from engineers at top tech companies about their internship journeys, how they got their offers, and tips for acing technical interviews.

2026
Upcoming

Intro to Machine Learning Workshop

Hands-on workshop covering the fundamentals of ML using Python and scikit-learn. We'll build and train a model from scratch. Bring your laptop!

Saturday, March 28, 2026Tech Center, Room 204

12
2026
Upcoming

Spring Hackathon 2026

Our flagship 24-hour hackathon! Build something amazing with your team. All skill levels welcome. Prizes for top 3 teams including cash, software licenses, and internship interviews.

Sunday, April 12, 2026Engineering Building, Main Atrium

Web Dev Bootcamp

A full-day bootcamp covering React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS. Participants built and deployed a personal portfolio by the end of the day.

Fall Kickoff & Club Fair

We kicked off the new semester with pizza, demos of our latest projects, and recruited 30+ new members. Thanks to everyone who came out!

Past

CTF Competition — Internal Round

Our first internal capture-the-flag competition. Teams competed across web, crypto, reverse engineering, and forensics challenges. Congrats to Team ByteBusters!
